tests: repository required CI, Security, Tri-App, Main Verification, and Release Policy checks
risk_notes: FlutterFire 4.x and Firebase Apple SDK 12 require a newer Flutter/Dart toolchain and iOS 15 minimum target.
local_auth 3.x changes the authenticate call signature and background persistence option.
Native plugin upgrades can alter Android and iOS build-time integration even when Dart analysis passes.
rollback_steps: Restore pubspec.yaml, pubspec.lock, main.dart, Podfile, and tri-app workflow from the parent main commit.
Run flutter pub get, flutter analyze, flutter test, Android release build, and iOS simulator build before redeployment.
validation_boundary: GitHub required checks on the pull-request head are authoritative and fail closed.
